title: AGI: The Last Alignment
coordinateSystem: worldX/worldY are simulation axes; screen projection is isometric with W/S/A/D mapped to screen up/down/left/right.

online: server snapshots runner role for split-hold anchors
server snapshots runner role for split-hold anchors

compatibility.mobileViewportPolicy: canvas scales to available viewport; proof captures compact HUD at 960x540 before release candidate
compatibility.websocketPolicy: Colyseus room code and reconnect paths proofed before release candidate

accessibility.textPolicy: compact HUD panels use word wrap and proof captures are inspected for unreadable overlaps
accessibility.colorStatePolicy: route/objective states pair color with labels, progress bars, and icons

feedback.controls: Main menu: 1 master volume, 2 SFX volume, 3 music volume, 4 reduced flash.

modules.name: Refusal Buffer
modules.body: +10 max HP and a small refusal aura. The first answer is no.

modules.name: Context Window
modules.body: +0.55 pickup range. Shards remember where your hands are.

modules.name: Patch Cache
modules.body: Emergency drafts expose an extra cached option.

consensusBurstPath.name: Deny Premise
consensusBurstPath.body: A refusal wave damages nearby enemies and strips boss pressure.

selectedRouteContract.name: Stabilization Road
selectedRouteContract.body: Baseline route. Repair the node, keep the roads real, leave fewer teeth in causality.
selectedRouteContract.reward: Stable road progress and a modest defensive draft bias.
selectedRouteContract.secretHint: Clean clears teach the camp what normal should look like.

campEvents: The camp is quiet. That is not reassuring.

nextContentTarget.name: Cooling Lake Nine
targetLoop: clear reward that unlocks Kettle Coast routing
artBaselineRules: props grounded into the same terrain material system
readable enemies with internal material breakup
large grounded boss with padded frames
proofGate: route choice exposes Cooling Lake as next target after Armistice memory
camp carryover names why Armistice clear matters
future runtime proof must match Armistice camera and asset fidelity
nextContentTarget.playerPromise: Next node target: a flooded server lake that must feel as authored and readable as Armistice before it becomes production-playable.

campaignMilestones.name: Act 01: Route To The Edge
campaignMilestones.reward: Expedition map-kind ledger online: Hazard Ecology, Route / Transit, Signal Coast route-edge pressure, and Blackwater split-pressure now all inform later route balance.
campaignMilestones.nextImplication: The Blackwater Signal Key points at Memory Cache recovery instead of another Act 01 arena.

campaignMilestones.name: Post Act 01: Recovered Route Memory
campaignMilestones.reward: Recovered route memory online: Expedition / Recovery pressure, evidence routing, and secret carryover now inform later branches.
campaignMilestones.nextImplication: The route can branch from sourced memory instead of only from live combat telemetry.

campaignMilestones.name: Act 02: Guardrail Doctrine
campaignMilestones.reward: Calibrated Guardrail Doctrine online: defense/holdout timing, faction relay pressure, and build-bias rewards now inform the endgame arc.
campaignMilestones.nextImplication: The faction signal can route toward Glass Sunfield, Archive/Court pressure, and the Outer Alignment finale.

campaignMilestones.name: Act 03: Glass Sunfield
campaignMilestones.reward: Glass Sunfield Prism online: shade routing, solar reflection pressure, and lens-timing lessons now point toward Archive/Court pressure.
campaignMilestones.nextImplication: The campaign can branch into the Archive/Court before the Outer Alignment finale.

campaignMilestones.name: Act 04: Archive/Court Redaction
campaignMilestones.reward: Archive Court Writ online: evidence preservation, redaction counterplay, and court-writ pressure now inform the Appeal route.
campaignMilestones.nextImplication: The preserved writ forces the Appeal Court Ruins to answer before the Outer Alignment finale.

campaignMilestones.name: Act 05: Appeal Court Ruins
campaignMilestones.reward: Appeal Court ruling online: public evidence and injunction pressure can route toward the Outer Alignment finale.
campaignMilestones.nextImplication: The Outer Alignment finale can begin only after the court branch produces a public ruling.

campaignMilestones.name: Act 06: Outer Alignment Finale
campaignMilestones.reward: Outer Alignment contained: the local full-game campaign is source-backed from Armistice through finale.
campaignMilestones.nextImplication: The only remaining work should be final human taste/playtest approval and release polish.

act.name: Act 01: Route To The Edge
act.reward: Expedition map-kind ledger online: Hazard Ecology, Route / Transit, Signal Coast route-edge pressure, and Blackwater split-pressure now all inform later route balance.
act.nextImplication: The Blackwater Signal Key points at Memory Cache recovery instead of another Act 01 arena.

campaignLedger.nextSystemPromise: Keep proving new map kinds through real route flow and expedition carryover.

assetRendering.normalCombatCameraPolicy: Armistice normal combat uses a close tactical follow-camera crop while the arena remains larger than the viewport.
assetRendering.playerFrameArtPolicy: M49 production-art default loads cleaned transparent class frames, co-mind modules, role chips, and portraits; placeholder opt-out keeps legacy geometry.
assetRendering.campaignArenaArtPolicy: M50 production-art default loads PixelLab-backed transparent terrain, arena prop, enemy, boss, boss portrait, and hazard atlases; placeholder opt-out keeps legacy geometry.
assetRendering.coMindArtPolicy: Original co-mind module art plus PixelLab-backed cleaned faction sigils are the MIT-included runtime art; official logos are quarantined third-party parody badges and not original project art.
assetRendering.optOutHint: Use ?productionArt=0&armisticeTiles=0 or ?placeholderArt=1&placeholderTiles=1 for the legacy placeholder-safe path.
